description: The template can be used to empower, educate, and inform your audience to promote change, equity, and inclusion. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.

html_data:
• NEWS
  • CONTACT
  • LOG IN

During the pandemic, hate crimes towards american asians have tripled. We stand with the american asian community against racism in all its forms.

stop

asian

hate

SOLIDARITY

EQUALITY

FREEDOM

WHAT CAN YOU DO

As well as being an ally, it’s important to be an

ACTIVE BYSTANDER

This can include amplifying the voices of those who are being silenced by sharing their stories and experiences, and calling out racism.

1. Call out negative behaviour

Tell the person to stop. Do this as a group if you can. Be polite and try not to aggravate the situation - remain calm. Don’t physically intervene – you could get hurt.

2. Try to get the victim out of the situation

Tell them they need to take a phone call, or strike up a conversation any excuse to get them away to safety.

3. Try distracting the perpetrator

Redirect the situation by starting a conversation with the perpetrator to allow their potential target to move away or have friends intervene.

4. Ask the victim if they're okay

Make sure to ask the victim if they’re okay – they’ll probably be in shock and feeling upset. Listen. Allow them to have a space to talk.

Donate to a charity that fights asian hate
